column1: # Title: Price adjustments for FAO agricultural and animal commodity data quality corrections
# Description: Corrections for known FAO data quality issues in specific regions and commodities.
# and trade data. Applied in module_aglu_L100.regional_ag_an_for_prices to calibration prices.
# GCAM_commodity: GCAM agricultural or animal commodity name
# adjustment_multiplier: Factor to multiply FAO price by (1.0 = no adjustment)
# notes: Explanation of the data quality issue and rationale for adjustment
